MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONG, GORDON SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-10-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 03 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUN-16-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON JUN-16-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

DEPT 3/JUDGE CHOPPELAS/REPORTER:M.BRADY/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ATNY J.SACRAMENTO PRESENT WITH PLTF. DEFT PARTICIA ALVARADO APPEARS IN PRO-PER. DEFT CARMEN SILVA IS NOT PRESENT. IF DEFT SILVA APPEARS AT PLTF COUNSEL'S OFFICE TO ALSO SIGN STIP, PLTF WILL REQUEST THAT TRIAL GO OFF CALENDAR AS SETTLED.

TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 05

JUDGE DESMOND, P.DOWLING/CSR, K.LEE/CLERK 09:40AM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. JOSEPH SACRAMENTO FOR THE PLTF AND NO APPR BY THE DEFT CARMEN SILVA. JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF AND AGAINST THE DEFT ON THE RECORD.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALVARADO, PATRICIA SILVA, CARMEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 715 LEAVENWORTH STREET #12, SAN FRANCISCO $1,169.06 RENT, $350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,519.06, STAYED UNTIL JUL-25-1997, COSTS PER COST BILL. POSS AWARDED TO PLTF AGAINST BOTH DEFTS (S/E TO 07/25 AS TO ALVARADO ONLY) MONETARY AWARD AGAINST DEFT SILVA ONLY. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS ON STIPULATION BETWEEN THE PLTF AND DEFT ALVARADO.
